hero.heading: Selected Projects.
hero.description: A record of data centre builds and operational infrastructure delivered across global markets under demanding conditions.

projects.title: NORWAY COMMERCIAL BANK
projects.description: Critical data infrastructure rebuilt within a renewable energy framework. High-availability architecture integrated directly into a wind farm power grid — carbon-neutral operational footprint, zero compromise on uptime.

projects.title: ARCTIC OVERHAUL
projects.description: Full data centre restoration executed remotely under 2020 pandemic isolation protocols. Complete infrastructure recovery achieved within 72 hours of initial deployment, without on-site personnel.

projects.title: DOHA MARITIME CENTER
projects.description: Purpose-built coastal data facility designed for peak-load event processing under extreme thermal conditions. Seawater cooling system integrated. Delivered on schedule to strict operational specifications.

projects.title: TOYOTA DATA PLANT
projects.description: Hyper-redundant power architecture engineered for uninterrupted manufacturing continuity. Assembly line operations protected from power system variance across all production stages.

projects.title: HOUSTON ENTERPRISE CORE
projects.description: Ground-up design and construction of a 12MW Tier IV data centre for a regional energy conglomerate. Full N+1 redundancy across power, cooling, and networking. Delivered on time and under budget with zero critical incidents during commissioning.

projects.title: APAC CLOUD NODE — SINGAPORE
projects.description: Modular containerised data centre deployment supporting a regional cloud provider's Southeast Asia expansion. Custom thermal management designed for Singapore's tropical climate. Live production traffic migrated with zero-downtime cutover.

projects.title: TORONTO FINANCIAL CLOUD
projects.description: End-to-end cloud infrastructure design and migration for a mid-market financial services firm. Legacy on-premise systems decommissioned, replaced with a hybrid cloud architecture spanning two availability zones. 40% reduction in infrastructure operating costs within 12 months of go-live.
